notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. Full-page DPR-aware canvas. Layered parallax (sunset sky gradient, low sun + atmospheric glow + lens streak, drifting clouds, far mountain ridge, rolling hills, pine/deciduous tree band, roadside poles/bushes/rocks/signs with sagging wires, road wedge with moving lane dashes, foreground grass tufts + wheel-kicked dust). Deterministic mulberry32 PRNG so repeating scenery wraps seamlessly via modulo scroll at per-layer speeds. Procedural side-view car: spinning spoked wheels (angle = dist/radius, no slip), rounded body + cabin + sunset-lit glass, head/tail lights, bumpers, subtle multi-frequency body bob + pitch. Cinematic overlays: warm wash, radial vignette, animated film grain. Hold click/touch/Space to accelerate, release to coast.
